---
id: get-federation-audit
title: "Federation audit log"
description: "Returns the federation security audit log. Captures rejected facts, rejected tokens, scope violations, and replay attacks. Use `peer_id` to narrow the log to a specific peer. See spec §6.4."
sidebar_label: "Federation audit log"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Federation audit log"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/federation/audit"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the federation security audit log. Captures rejected facts, rejected tokens, scope violations, and replay attacks. Use `peer_id` to narrow the log to a specific peer. See spec §6.4.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
